sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 월마트는 4분기 매출 1,907억 달러를 기록하며 견조한 성장세를 보였고, 300억 달러 규모의 신규 자사주 매입을 발표했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 1,907억 달러로 전년 대비 5.6% 성장했으며, 영업이익은 10.8% 증가하며 매출 성장률을 상회했습니다.
주주 환원 정책의 일환으로 300억 달러 규모의 신규 자사주 매입 프로그램을 승인하고 연간 배당금을 0.99달러로 인상했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 글로벌 이커머스 매출이 24% 성장했으며, 광고 사업 부문은 37% 성장하는 등 디지털 및 서비스 부문에서 강세를 보였습니다.
전 세계 멤버십 수수료 수익이 15.1% 증가하며 고객 충성도 기반의 수익 모델이 강화되었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 기준 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.53달러, 조정 EPS는 0.74달러를 기록했습니다.
영업 현금 흐름은 416억 달러로 전년 대비 51억 달러 증가했으며, 잉여 현금 흐름은 149억 달러를 달성했습니다.

watchItems.text: 2027 회계연도 매출 3.5~4.5% 성장 및 조정 영업이익 6.0~8.0% 성장 가이던스 달성 여부 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 earningsreleasefy26q4.htm PRESS RELEASE Document Walmart reports Q4 results • Revenue growth of 5.6%, up 4.9% in constant currency (cc) 1 • Operating income growing faster at 10.8%, up 10.5% adjusted (cc) 1 • eCommerce sales up 24% globally • GAAP EPS of $0.53; Adjusted EPS 1 of $0.74 • Company announces new $30 billion share repurchase authorization • Company provides outlook for Q1 and FY27 “ BENTONVILLE, Ark., February 19, 2026 – Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ: WMT) announces fourth-quarter results with strong growth in revenue and adjusted operating income. Globally, eCommerce grew 24% with strength across segments. Walmart U.S. comp sales 2 grew 4.6%. Looking ahead, the Company issues guidance for FY27 with net sales expected to grow 3. 5% to 4.5% an d adjusted operating income to grow 6.0% to 8.0%, both in constant currency (“cc”) 1 . Adjusted EPS 1 is e  Normalized numeric aliases: $30 billion = 300억 달러; $0.53 = 0.53달러; $0.74 = 0.74달러; $30 = 30달러; $2.75 = 2.75달러; $2.85 = 2.85달러.

. The pace of change in retail is accelerating. It’s exciting. And our financial results show that we’re not only embracing this change, we’re leading it. For our customers and members, the future is fast, convenient, and personalized.” John Furner President and CEO, Walmart Fourth Quarter Highlights • Revenue of $190.7 billion, up 5.6%, or 4.9% (cc) 1 • Global eCommerce sales grew 24%, led by store-fulfilled pickup & delivery and marketplace • Global advertising business 3 up 37%, including VIZIO; Walmart Connect in the U.S. up 41% • Membership fee revenue grew 15.1% globally • Gross margin rate up 13 bps, led by Walmart U.S. • Operating income up $0.8 billion, or 10.8%; up 10.5% adjusted (cc) 1 , growing faster than sales • Adjusted EPS 1 of $0.74 excludes the impact, net of tax, from a net loss of  Normalized numeric aliases: $190.7 billion = 1,907억 달러; $0.8 billion = 8억 달러; $713.2 billion = 7,132억 달러; $190.7 = 190.7달러; $0.8 = 0.8달러; $0.74 = 0.74달러; $0.21 = 0.21달러; $713.2 = 713.2달러.

up 4.7%, or 5.1% (cc) 1 • Operating income up $0.5 billion or 1.6%; up 5.4% adjusted (cc) 1 , growing faster than sales • Global advertising business 3 grew 46% to nearly $6.4 billion, including VIZIO • ROA at 8.2%; ROI at 15.1% 1 , negatively affected ~35 bps from discrete items 4 • Global inventory up 4.3%; up 2.6% (cc) 5 • Increased annual dividend to $0.99 per share 1 See additional information at the end of this release regarding non-GAAP financial measures. 2 Comp sales for the 13-week period ended January 30, 2026 compared to the 13-week period ended January 31, 2025 and excludes fuel. See Supplemental Financial Information for additional information. 3 Our global advertising business is recorded in either net sales or as a reduction to cost of sales, depending on the nature of the advertising arrangement. 4 Represents items which were adjusted from operating inc  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.5 billion = 5억 달러; $6.4 billion = 64억 달러; $0.5 = 0.5달러; $6.4 = 6.4달러; $0.99 = 0.99달러.

Balance Sheet and Liquidity: cash and cash equivalents were $10.7 billion; total debt was $51.5 billion; operating cash flow was $41.6 billion, up $5.1 billion; free cash flow was $14.9 billion, up $2.3 billion; repurchases were 85.0 million shares YTD, or $8.1 billion; inventory was $58.9 billion. Normalized numeric aliases: $10.7 billion = 107억 달러; $51.5 billion = 515억 달러; $41.6 billion = 416억 달러; $5.1 billion = 51억 달러; $14.9 billion = 149억 달러; $2.3 billion = 23억 달러; $8.1 billion = 81억 달러; $58.9 billion = 589억 달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
